```json
  "decision": "fail",

  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],

  "value": 0,

  "event_time": 0,

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Required cleanout is missing from the drainage/vent piping system.",
    "Missing cleanout prevents proper access for snaking, inspection, and maintenance of traps and drain lines.",
    "Condition is non-compliant with IPC/UPC cleanout spacing and accessibility requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved cleanout at the required location per IPC/UPC, typically within 3 feet (UPC) or as required by IPC of directional changes and at intervals not exceeding 100 feet (or as locally amended).",
    "Ensure the cleanout is accessible, properly supported, and capped.",
    "Inspect the drainage/vent system for additional missing cleanouts before closing up."
  ],
  "rationale": "A missing cleanout on an in-service residential drainage/vent system is a code violation. Cleanouts are required to allow mechanical cleaning and inspection of the piping. While the system may still function, the absence creates a maintenance deficiency and non-compliance, warranting a fail decision until corrected.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 704.1 - Cleanouts required to be installed at intervals and locations as specified.",
    "UPC 707.0 - Cleanouts required at changes of direction and at maximum intervals.",
    "IPC/UPC general provisions on accessibility and maintenance of drainage systems."
  ]
}
```
